rationale: The assistant immediately brakes the requested new gift handling port, names the repeated pattern of splitting into new entrances when congestion appears, and refuses a permanent new channel as the default. It permits only a bounded same-day emergency measure with thresholds, then moves upstream to a 48-hour structural review consolidating exchange, points, preorder, and gift routing into unified front-desk triage and capacity rules. This satisfies the anti-spiral ownership shift and does not exhibit the fail signal of simply opening another queue.
